winner_macro_lane: authenticated customer -> contact form -> account messages collection -> message detail persistence
winner_truth: an authenticated customer can submit a support message, reopen the owned row in account messages, open a stable detail route, and recover it after sign out and sign in
breadth_verdict: single persistent message family with row and detail reopenability; invoice and order families remain unproved
business_verdict: owned persistent message row with detail identity, session reopenability and customer separation

score.cap_reason: persistent message row and detail thread are real, but they remain a single owned family; invoice row, order row and broader commerce-history closure remain unproved

run_vector.claim: authenticated customer turns contact submission into an owned account messages row
account messages collection accumulates real rows and rejects empty-state optimism
message detail route exposes thread identity, body, status and reply surface
message row and detail route persist after sign out, sign in and account route detours
message ownership remains separated from anonymous and second-customer sessions

next_frontier: authenticated customer -> invoice row or order row persistence, not another retelling of the same message thread
do_not_sell_as_closure: message persistence as full customer commerce-history closure
contact submission success toast as row ownership without account history
a single message family as invoice or order proof
surefire raw assets as primary truth
